headline: Why Cigna (CI) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of health insurance company Cigna (NYSE:CI) jumped 3.5% in the afternoon session after analyst firm Bernstein raised its price target on the stock to $381 from $371, citing a positive outlook. Bernstein maintained its "Outperform" rating on Cigna.
